plugin_desc: NVIDIA Cumulus Linux 开放网络交换机专用 SNMP 采集模板（基于标准 NET-SNMP，含 HOST-RESOURCES-MIB / UCD-SNMP-MIB / LM-SENSORS-MIB）。除标准 IF-MIB 64 位 HC 接口流量外，额外采集 Cumulus Linux 健康指标：CPU 使用率（HOST-RESOURCES hrProcessorLoad 多核均值）、主内存（总量 + 空闲，字节，用量按 (总量-空闲)/总量 推导）与机箱温度（LM-SENSORS 温度传感器，℃）。Cumulus Linux 以软件 NOS 运行于白盒交换机硬件，标准 NET-SNMP 未以无需行级过滤的标量形式暴露独立风扇与电源状态 OID，故风扇与电源为 N/A。适用品牌型号——NVIDIA / Cumulus Linux 白盒交换机（Cumulus Linux NOS，基于标准 NET-SNMP）。
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the Cumulus Linux switch, averaged across processors from HOST-RESOURCES-MIB hrProcessorLoad.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: Total physical memory of the Cumulus Linux switch in bytes (UCD-SNMP-MIB memTotalReal).

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Free physical memory of the Cumulus Linux switch in bytes (UCD-SNMP-MIB memAvailReal).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Cumulus Linux switch, derived as (total-free)/total.

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Chassis temperature of the Cumulus Linux switch in degrees Celsius (LM-SENSORS-MIB lmTempSensorsValue).

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
